_schema.rules: Recurring or one-off campaign rules that the daily generator uses to decide what drafts to create. Each rule produces 0..N drafts per day depending on its trigger.

ruleShape.name: string — human label shown on calendar
ruleShape.type: weekly_digest | event_cadence | wine_club | golf | menu_spotlight | weather_patio | birthday | win_back | reservation_recap | new_subscriber_welcome | manual

schedule.trigger: weather_match | inactive_60d | birthday_today | post_visit_2d — for trigger kind

ruleShape.segment: Subscribed | Wine Club | Golf | Event Attendees | All

rules.name: This Week At The Quarry — Weekly Digest
rules.notes: Roundup of bands + events for the upcoming week. Pulls from events.json + bands schedule.

rules.name: Event 4-Touch Cadence
rules.notes: Auto-generates 4 drafts per upcoming event in events.json. Uses event_promo_30d -> event_promo_2d types in ai-draft.js.

rules.name: Patio Weather Alert (Thu-Sun)
rules.notes: Disabled by default — needs weather API integration first. Settings in marketing_drafts.json.weather.

rules.name: Birthday Club — Treat Yourself
rules.notes: Disabled — needs birthday field on subscriber records first.

rules.name: Win-Back — Haven't Visited in 60 Days
rules.notes: Disabled — needs visit tracking. Will activate once POS integration lands.

rules.name: Post-Visit Thank You
rules.notes: Disabled — needs reservation/visit data. Will activate once linked.

rules.name: Menu Spotlight (Fridays)
rules.notes: Single dish or new menu launch. Sensory language. Friday late-morning when people are deciding the weekend.
